example.value: Bah Duan kikerakdik, kisabar pek kibual ma-ma bile binyeh ya ikekawat sekulah, ilei ajeh niknij begei ha dog.

definitionorgloss.value: thorny palm; a type of fruit of jungle palm tree

example.value: Hunen ya hajap hiha-berkep pelek salak medei ya jeoi tik bibuka ha tik ceber ru tik sawet. Amen hiet nu jeres, baru mong enggamak.

translation.value: Sekarang sudah semakin susah untuk mendapatkan buah salak kerana sudah banyak tanah yang diterokai bagi kebun getah dan kebun sawit. Mungkin kita dapat menjumpainya jika ke hutan.

Now it is getting harder and harder to get the thorny palm fruit because most of the land has been cleared for rubber plantations and oil palm plantations. We can maybe find it if we go to the forest.

sambal, a generic name for food with cili papper as the base

example.value: Bah Loli had kimasak sambal kak mileh ha icaknak tengah arik. Kimasak ringkas taleh medei ha kibujang.

translation.value: Bah Loli cuma memasak sambal ikan bilis sebagai lauk makan tengah hari. Dia memasak dengan ringkas sahaja kerana dia masih bujang.
Bah Loli only cooked anchovy sambal as a side-dish for lunch. He cooked simple food because he is still single.

definitionorgloss.value: sambut; menerima atau mengalu-alukan kehadiran seseorang atau tetamu
to welcome; to receive; to celebrate; to observe

example.value: Wak Jira kisamut bor teniba pelajar-pelajar ju Korea nu imadeg.

translation.value: Wak Jira menerima dengan baik kedatangan pelajar-pelajar dari Korea ke rumahnya.
Wak Jira welcomed the arrival of the students from Korea to her house.

definitionorgloss.value: menerima, menadah atau menangkap sesuatu dengan tangan

example.value: "Kenon hek ya panei besamut bula hamapen ilei pai nutahut lebeh iumor," Wak Julai kipasal nu Wak Lini.

translation.value: "Anak kamu sudah pandai menyambut bola walaupun umurnya baharu mencecah setahun lebih," Wak Julai berkata kepada Wak Lini.
"Your son is good at catching the ball even though he is just over a year old," Wak Julai told Wak Lini.

example.value: "Jik jisamut arik raya puase ru arik Krismas ku deg jik medei mong numom tenek eng de Islam, ru numom nij de Kristian," Wak Maria kipasal nu ikawat keral.

translation.value: "Kami menyambut perayaan hari raya puasa dan hari Krismas di rumah kami kerana terdapat seorang kakak saya yang beragama Islam dan seorang abang saya yang beragama Kristian," Wak Maria memberitahu kepada teman lelakinya.
"We celebrate Eid and Christmas at our house because I have a Muslim sister and a Christian brother," Wak Maria told her boyfriend.

definitionorgloss.value: child; children; minor, a person who is still legally minor

example.value: Mong jeoi mambek sanget ku deg Bah Selah medei kek kibeh harijadi ikenon.

translation.value: Terdapat ramai kanak-kanak di rumah Bah Selah kerana dia membuat sambutan harijadi anaknya.
There were many children in Bah Selah's house because he was celebrating his son's birthday.

example-2.value: "Senanyet jik manah entem lekat pek mong letreg lagi ku kampug, pek begei hunen," Bah Wan kiurok nu ikekenon.

translation-2.value: "Semasa kami masih kecil dahulu masih belum terdapat bekalan elektrik di kampung, tidak seperti sekarang," Bah Wan berkata kepada anak-anaknya.
"During my childhood, there was still no electricity in the village, unlike now," Bah Wan said to his children.

Terdapat ramai kanak-kanak di rumah Bah Selah kerana dia membuat sambutan harijadi anaknya.
There were many children in Bah Selah's house because he was celebrating his son's birthday.
"Senanyet jik manah entem lekat pek mong letreg lagi ku kampug, pek begei hunen," Bah Wan kiurok nu ikekenon.
"Semasa kami masih kecil dahulu masih belum terdapat bekalan elektrik di kampung, tidak seperti sekarang," Bah Wan berkata kepada anak-anaknya.
"During my childhood, there was still no electricity in the village, unlike now," Bah Wan said to his children.

definitionorgloss.value: takat; had; paras; sampai pada takat yang tertentu

example.value: "Kelemnek kimanik ihad lebat lei teu ku englag deg jik ajeh ya kihuj lei nu sangkat rengkal deg jik. Ihat jisengoh doh jadi beag," Bah Kamil kipasal nu ikekawat kerjak.

translation.value: "Semalam hujan dengan sangat lebat sehingga sungai yang terdapat di tepi rumah kami melimpah sehingga paras tangga di rumah kami. Kami sangat takut banjir akan terjadi," Bah Kamil memberitahu kepada kawan-kawan sekerjanya.
"Yesterday it rained so hard that the river to the side of our house overflowed to the level of the stairs at the enterance. We are very afraid of floods happening," Bah Kamil told his colleagues.

definitionorgloss.value: menyapu; membersihkan kekotoran dengan menggunakan sesuatu penyapu, kain dsb.

example.value: Wak Bibah kisapu ideg medei jeoi paser ju mabek sanget de naimuj-hol pek bekasot.

Wak Bibah swept his house because there was a lot of sand due to her children going in and out of the house barefoot.

example.value: Wak Jijah kidek telas kiog caknak nu mai gila ru kibeh pek panei bile mai gila ajeh kiulur iteg kaha-salam ha ilei, medei kiseer.

translation.value: Wak Jijah terus berlalu pergi setelah memberi makanan kepada orang gila tersebut dan membuat tidak nampak apabila orang gila tersebut menghulurkan tangannya untuk bersalam dengannya, kerana dia merasa jijik.
Wak Jijah immediately left after giving food to the madman and pretending not to see when the madman reached out his hand to shake hands with her, because she felt disgusted.

example-2.value: Tong sampah ku englag deg kedei ajeh ya liu pek bisuj, besenger hineng.

translation-2.value: Tong sampah yang terdapat di sebelah kedai tersebut sudah lama tak dicuci, ianya kelihatan menjijikkan.
The rubbish bin at the side of the shop has not been washed for a long time, it looks disgusting.

example.value: "Agok kiseg kambeg ajeh ku keneng legos medei ku pajeh mong jeoi gesok," Bah Ramli kipasal nu ikenon.

"Do not tie the goat to the rambutan tree because there are weaver ants there," Bah Ramli said to his son.

example.value: Bah Ude segat kerakjak, had ikenah taleh de bekerjak kakkek caknak ha peringak ubai.

translation.value: Bah Ude malas bekerja, cuma isterinya sahaja yang bekerja mencari rezeki bagi keluarga mereka.
Bah Ude is too lazy to work, only his wife works to earn a living for their family.

definitionorgloss-2.value: pemalas; seseorang yang tidak mahu berbuat apa-apa dan lebih senang atau gemar untuk berehat-rehat sahaja sepanjang hari
idler; lazybones; someone who doesn't want to do anything but just resting all day

example-2.value: Bah Zuan ajeh ihad isenenggat, ma hentok de kibeh sepanjang arik, had kineng tv taleh.

translation-2.value: Bah Zuan adalah seorang yang pemalas, beliau tidak melakukan sebarang pekerjaan sepanjang hari, cuma menonton tv sahaja.
Bah Zuan is a lazybones, he does not do any work all day, just watches tv.

example.value: Wak Sara ru iamek ubai seh bak de naikej padehjeh.

translation.value: Wak Sara dan ibunya sedang menumbuk padi yang dituai tempoh hari.
Wak Sara and her mother are pounding the paddy that they harvested the other day.

example.value: Wak Maria kiseh lada cep ku guul batuuq medei kaha-masak ru kak masak lemak.

translation.value: Wak Maria menumbuk cili burung di dalam lesung batu kerana dimasak bersama ikan masak lemak.
Wak Maria pounded bird chili in a stone mortar to be cooked with the fish that was being cooked with the coconut milk.

example.value: Mat Bah Joe as bisej ya senej mase kiteh legos kelemnek.

translation.value: Mata Bah Joe bengkak akibat disengat oleh tebuan semasa dia memetik buah rambutan semalam.
Bah Joe's eyes were swollen as a consequence of being stung by a hornet while harvesting rambutan the previous evening.

definitionorgloss-2.value: penyengat; serangga yang boleh menyengat seperti tebuan
an insect that can sting like a hornet and a wasp

example-2.value: Kelem jihnek, Bah Mino kicip ku belak kenglap ru pek eng bakek kijebat ha senej.

translation-2.value: Malam tadi Bah Mino berjalan di dalam gelap dan tidak nampak bahawa dia terpijak penyengat.
Last night Bah Mino walked in the dark and did not see that he had accidentally stepped on a stinging insect.

example.value: Bah Rukan kisemanj iapak kibeli meskar pai ha ilei, tapi bibeh pek panei taleh ya iapak medei ilei kikedei jaga barang, selalo kiperusak.

example.value: Ihat senang Bah Jali kihuj keneng betar, sekejap taleh ya buleh kilei nu imol.

translation.value: Bah Jali memanjat pokok petai dengan amat mudah sekali dan hanya sebentar sahaja masa yang beliau ambil untuk ke hujung pokok.
It is very easy for Bah Jali to climb the petai tree and it doesn't take much time for him to get to the top.

definitionorgloss-2.value: to make fun or happy; to make easy

example-2.value: Bah Ridan kiles ha ikenah medei kisernang ha ikekenon ru sahnah kasot sekulah bimbei. Kek kihod dea ikekenon naibelajar bedikari.

translation-2.value: Bah Ridan memarahi isterinya kerana menyenangkan anak-anaknya dengan membasuh kasut sekolah mereka. Dia mahu anak-anaknya tersebut belajar berdikari.
Bah Ridan scolded his wife for making it easy for their children by washing their school shoes. He wants their children to learn to be independent.

to be disturbed; to be disturbed by evil spirits while sleeping

example.value: Kelem ajehnek, Bah Cia biserlet mase tengah kibukbet. Kirasa ilei begei bicertet lei pek buleh kibelehem.

definitionorgloss.value: mungkir janji ; tidak menepati janji (menurut kepercayaan tradisi bahawa malapetaka akan menimpa sekiranya janji untuk mengikuti seseorang tidak ditepati, di mana malapetaka tersebut akan menimpa pada orang yang dijanji, bukan pada orang yang berjanji)

to break a promise (according to the traditional belief that disaster will befall if the promise to follow someone is not fulfilled, in which case the disaster will befall on the person who is promised to be followed, not the  other person who made the promise to follow him or her)

example.value: Mai kampug naipecaya isebab Bah Sani bitimpak ya jehuk medei iceknip nu serag ajeh biserlog ya Bah Buli.

translation.value: Orang kampung mempercayai bahawa sebab Bah Sani ditimpa oleh pokok adalah kerana Bah Buli mungkir janji untuk mengikuti beliau ke hutan.
The villagers believe that the reason that a tree fell on Bah Sani was because Bah Buli broke his promise to follow him to the forest.

definitionorgloss.value: to step accidentally into a hole

example.value: Wak Lili kiserloh ha lubang medei ilei kibeingak nengneng ha italipon.

translation.value: Wak Lili terpijak lubang kerana dia khusyuk melihat pada telefon bimbitnya.

definitionorgloss.value: diganggu; diganggu oleh roh-roh jahat semasa tidur
to be disturb; to be disturbed by evil spirits while sleeping

example.value: Kelem ajehnek, Bah Cia biserlup mase tengah kibukbet. Kirasa ilei begei bicertet lei pek buleh kibelehem.

translation.value: Malam tadi Bah Cia diganggu oleh roh jahat semasa dia sedang tidur. Dia merasakan dirinya seperti dihempap sehingga tidak boleh bernafas.
Last night Bah Cia was disturbed by an evil spirit while he was sleeping. He felt as if he was being crushed so that he could not breathe.

displayXhtml: sernangsenang

example.value: Ya liu Wak Hana kiserngik kaha-kot kerite pai, tapi lekat pek lalu kaha-bayar jap gecek.

translation.value: Wak Hana sudah lama berfikir mahu membeli kereta baharu, tetapi dia belum mampu membayarnya pada setiap bulan.
Wak Hana has been thinking about buying a new car for a long time, but she is still unable to afford the monthly installments.

definitionorgloss-2.value: berfikir; termenung; duduk diam sambil berkhayal dan berfikir berkenaan dengan sesuatu

example-2.value: Ya memerip minit Bah Rilan kitemenung medei kiserakngik kaha-jog nu kampugka tok. Ilei ihad kiriag ha iperingak ku kampug tapi pek cukop ibelanja ha iceknip kaha-jog nu kampug. Jadi, tengah kiserakngik ma de patot kibeh.

translation-2.value: Sudah berberapa minit Bah Rilan termenung kerana sedang berfikir sama ada mahu pulang atau tidak ke kampung. Beliau sangat merindui keluarganya di kampung tetapi tidak mempunyai belanja yang cukup bagi perjalanan untuk pulang ke kampung. Jadi, beliau sedang berfikir perkara yang patut beliau lakukan.

Bah Rilan has been pensive for several minutes now because he is thinking about whether or not he should go back to the village. He really misses his family but does not have enough money for the trip. So, he is thinking what to do.

example.value: "Entem teu adeh seroi, tapi hunen ya bekur medei jeoi mai pekpej sampah ru teu lungkang bisalor nu madeh," engrok atok eng.

translation.value: "Dahulu sungai ini jernih, tetapi sekarang sudah keruh kerana ramai orang membuang sampah dan menyalurkan air longkang ke sini," kata datuk saya.
"Before, this river was clear, but now it is cloudy because many people throw trash and channel the ditch water here," said my grandfather.

example.value: Taya mutu Bah Dani kiserop medei terok ya paku.

definitionorgloss.value: assistant person to the headman of a village

example.value: "Seten kampug jik imuh Bah Piyoh, ma-ma ihal, amen pek habakek tok penghulu, buleh habakek kek," Wak Ramlah kipasal nu pegawai JAKOA.

translation.value: "Pembantu tok batin di kampung kami namanya Bah Piyoh. Jika ada sebarang urusan dan kalian tidak dapat menghubungi tok batin, kalian boleh berjumpa dengan beliau," Wak Ramlah berkata kepada pegawai JAKOA.
"The assistant to the headman of our village is named Bah Piyoh. If you guys have any business and you can not contact the headman, you can go to the assistant," Wak Ramlah told the JAKOA officials.

definitionorgloss.value: curi; mengambil kepunyaan orang lain dengan cara yang salah dan tanpa kebenaran

example.value: Mong jeoi pules ku kedei emas ajeh medei naiha-cap mai siksij de tengah kisij ha kedei ajeh. Imai siksij akeh lekat mong ku kateh ikedei ajeh mase pules nailei nu majeh.

translation.value: Terdapat ramai polis di kedai emas tersebut kerana mereka mahu menangkap perompak yang sedang merompak kedai tersebut. Pencuri tersebut masih berada di kedai tersebut semasa polis tiba di tempat kejadian.
There are many policemen in the jewelery shop because they want to arrest the robber who is robbing the shop. The thief was still at the store when the police arrived at the scene.

definitionorgloss-2.value: merahsiakan sesuatu perbuatan atau tindakan dari pengetahuan umum; melakukan sesuatu secara senyap-senyap
to keep secret; to conceal a deed or action from the public

example-2.value: Wak Elis kibersij ju iamek ilei kiet nu runggen kelemnek.

translation-2.value: Wak Elis merahsiakan dari ibunya bahawa beliau ke joget malam tadi.
Wak Elis kept it a secret from her mother that she had gone to a dance party the previous night.

definitionorgloss-2.value: mencuri; mengambil sesuatu barang kepunyaan orang lain tanpa pengetahuan yang empunya hak

example-2.value: Bah Minda bicap ya pules medei kiseksij ku pasaraya.

translation-2.value: Bah Minda ditangkap oleh polis kerana mencuri di pasar raya.
Bah Minda was arrested by the police for stealing from a supermarket.

Bah Deli is a naughty kid, yesterday he intentionally got his friend's bicycle tyre stuck in a hole.
to be stuck; to be caught
Bah Pian's hand got stuck between the cupboards as he wanted to pick up his shirt that had fallen on the back of the closet.

definitionorgloss.value: menyuluh; menerangi sesuatu tempat dengan menggunakan penyuluh.
to shine a light; to illuminate a place with a torch

example.value: Bah Kamil kisog keneng legos medei kaha-kira ha ipog, tapi ilampu ajeh pek merip lau medei ibeteri ya kaha-dij.

translation.value: Bah Kamil menyuluh pokok rambutan bagi mengira bilangan ayamnya (kerana ayamnya tidur di pokok tersebut), tetapi lampu sulu yang beliau gunakan tersebut tidak berberapa terang kerana baterinya sudah mahu habis.

Bah Kamil shone a light at the rambutan tree to count the number of his chickens (because his chickens slept on that tree), but the flashlight he used was not very bright because the battery was about to run out.

definitionorgloss-2.value: to search for something with a light

example-2.value: Bah Jinal kiseksog tabeg kelem ajeh nek.

translation-2.value: Bah Jinal pergi menyuluh katak pada malam tadi.
Bah Jinal went to search for frogs with a light last night.

definitionorgloss.value: cakap; beritahu; memberitahu; memberitakan pada seseorang tentang sesuatu

example.value: "Sureh nu apak hek, huper doh mong gotong-royong ku dewan," Bah Long kiurok nu kenon Bah Pandak.

translation.value: "Beritahu kepada bapa kamu, esok terdapat gotong-royong di dewan," Bah Long berkata kepada anak Bah Pandak.
